summary: A solid tour opener with standout debut of “Reuben and Cherise” and strong highlights in both sets; recording sounds decent though the source is unclear.
review: Both reviewers praise this early‑1991 show as a great way to kick off the tour, noting tight playing and the historic first performance of “Reuben and Cherise,” which even elicits an enthusiastic crowd reaction. No specific audio issues are mentioned, so the recording is assumed to be listenable despite the unknown source type.

ai_rating.rationale: Two highly positive reviews highlight a strong musical performance and no reported sound problems; limited review count reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on sound clarity, mix, or any flaws, implying the recording is acceptable but its exact source (soundboard/audience) is unspecified.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers mention highlights in both sets, describing the concert as a strong start to the tour with good pacing throughout.
